DEPT. 501: CROSS-DEFENDANTS MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, SANSOME STREET ADVISORS, ROBERT DUMAS AND WARO LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTIONS 1 AND 2 TO ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT REASONABLE RELIANCE IN LIGHT OF ROSENTHAL VS. GREAT WESTERN FIN. (1996) 14 CAL 4TH 394 AND DAMAGES. DEMURRER IS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON SEP-10-2014 BY HON. RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY AS TO ELDER ABUSE CLAIM. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney L. Peter Ryan, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (415-781-4400), counsel for plaintiff/cross-defendant/demurring party
Attorney Camilo Artiga-Purcell, Esq. of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy LLP (650-697-6000), counsel for defendant/cross-complainant/opposing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

CROSS-DEFENDANTs MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, SANSOME STREET ADVISORS, ROBERT DUMAS and WARO LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained in part and Taken under submission in part.

Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend causes of actions 1, 2 and 3 to allege facts to support reasonable reliance in light of Rosenthal vs. Great Western Fin. (1996) 14 Cal 4th 394 and damages.

Demurrer is Argued and taken under submission as to elder abuse claim.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Continued To Sep-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTs MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC, SANSOME STREET ADVISORS, INC, ROBERT DUMAS and WARO LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to September 10, 2014 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Lis Pendens And For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
L Peter Ryan, Esq. of Fox Rothschild (415-781-4400) for Market Street Real Estate Partners, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Camilo Artiga-Purcell, Esq of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy, LLP (650-697-6000) for Nam Investments, Defendant and moving party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs NAM INVESTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, NANCY MAR's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Lis Pendens And For Attorneys' Fees And Costs is
GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence that probable validity of a real property claim. The only executed contract offered by Plaintiff does not give rise to a real property claim. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form and leave the sanction amount blank. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
L Peter Ryan, Esq. of Fox Rothschild (415-781-4400) for Market Street Real Estate Partners, Plaintiff, Cross Defendant and moving party.
Camilo Artiga-Purcell, Esq of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy, LLP (650-697-6000) for Nam Investments, Defendant, Cross-complainant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:CROSS DEFENDANTs MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC, SANSOME STREET ADVISORS, INC, ROBERT DUMAS, WARO LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
